string.text: A modified "Sparkler" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Flash" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Moonlight" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Battery" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Goldfish" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Mama's Beads" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Firefly" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Snowflake" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Soul" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Stone Flower" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Flame" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Shell" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Fireball" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Meat Chunk" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Kolobok" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Gravi" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Eye" artifact. The radioactive component has been removed.
A modified "Jellyfish" artifact. Merging it with the "Mushroom" artifact completely changed its structure.
